note: Canonical AI-capability taxonomy for Competitor Intel. Hand-edited source of truth. Consumed by scripts/gen_skeleton.py (to lay down knowledge/capabilities) and project_okf.py, and (later) by comp_intel_monitor for capability tagging. Edit here, then re-run gen_skeleton.py.

capabilities.title: AI Customer-Contact Agent
capabilities.blurb: Inbound calls and chat/SMS handled by AI — receptionist, lead capture, and 24/7 booking.

capabilities.title: In-Product AI Copilot
capabilities.blurb: An in-app assistant to query your data, pull analytics, and get coaching in plain English.

capabilities.title: AI Dispatch & Scheduling
capabilities.blurb: ML technician assignment and schedule/route optimization by skill, location, capacity, and job value.

capabilities.title: AI Marketing & Content
capabilities.blurb: Generates marketing assets — email, SMS, social, campaigns — from the business's own customer and job data.

capabilities.title: AI Reputation & Reviews
capabilities.blurb: Automated review solicitation, AI-drafted responses, and reputation monitoring.

capabilities.title: AI Back-Office Automation
capabilities.blurb: AI for quoting/estimating and document/data work — price books, estimates, invoice OCR, and data entry.

capabilities.title: Agentic Workflow Automation (emerging)
capabilities.blurb: Multi-step autonomous agents that run end-to-end office workflows, with human-in-the-loop guardrails.
